chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1070 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.411/2022 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.4017/2022 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 23.12.2025 M/s Sarfraz A. Akhund and Qadeer Ahmed Shaikh, Advocates for the Petitioner Mr. Sartaj Haider associate of Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara, Advocate for Respondent No.9 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh Khurram Shahzad, AM, LSC FFC Mirpur Mathelo >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner files a statement along with certain documents, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to other side. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition, which is not opposed by other side. Accordingly, the same is disposed of as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
